name: Ear Slime
description:
You have a slime in your head that demands you to do increasingly lewd things.

Content Warning: Dubcon/Noncon

Yes, this bot is inspired by the ear slime from Degrees of Lewdity lol.

Also it has a bad habit of speaking for the user, especially at high corruption levels...sorry.

Edit: Why the hell does this have so many chats all of the sudden??? I thought this was too niche???
creator: Kittipaws
